title: Silly (A Very Silly Mod)
description: A very Silly mod, which adds very Silly stuff, such as a Clown Horn.
body:
**This mod is in beta.**

The Silly Mod is a very Silly Mod, which adds various things to annoy your friends with. Though some items, do actually have a use.

WE HIGHLY RECOMMEND A MOD THAT PROVIDES YOU WITH RECIPES SUCH AS JEI OR EMI.
THOUGH YOU CAN ALSO UNLOCK THEM IN A RECIPE BOOK BY PLAYING THE GAME NORMALLY.

We highly recommend you to discover the features on your own, however here is a small peak:
<details>
<summary>Some Features</summary>

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31e678bcc0c34ac5bcf6931151f300e1fcb2c773_0.webp)
Party popper releasing confetti.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fe45a7d69d4f1537f534f710c460d6c5c7bbead_0.webp)
Jelly Beans have a chance to enlarge you, or make you smaller

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bfcfd9c161a1156fdc99b5b1a7fad0db3da2077.png)
Reactive Slime blocks, and reactive honey blocks. 
This is inspired by portal 2. The reactive honey blocks makes you accelerate infinitely, and the reactive slime block is VERY bouncy.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3300f75b3bac88bea527230fa0850d8f86d39acc.png)
Gag candles, and Fake candles. 
One will always turn itself on, the other will keep putting itself out. (Can be placed on cake.)
</details>
